name: mojo
description: Skill that teaches coding agents to write idiomatic, correct, performant, current Mojo. Targets Mojo v1.0.0b1 and prevents stale pre-2025 syntax.

plugins.name: mojo
plugins.description: Write idiomatic, correct, performant, current Mojo - fundamentals, ownership, traits, comptime, performance (SIMD/vectorize/parallelize), and GPU kernels. Targets Mojo v1.0.0b1 and prevents stale pre-2025 syntax.
